aiCommentCN: 跌的时候别急，趋势还没来。
aiCommentEN: Don't panic when it dips, trend isn't here yet.
aiSummaryCN:
【交易观点】
比特币短期内可能会维持上涨势头。
【关键位置】
当前价位76,255美元，需关注78,000美元一线。
【短线策略】
考虑做多，目标价位78,500美元。
【风险提醒】
注意78,000美元阻力位，若跌破76,000美元需及时止损。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin is likely to maintain its upward trend in the short term.
[Key Drivers]
Current price is $76,255, with $78,000 as a key resistance level.
[Outlook]
Consider going long, targeting $78,500.
[Reminder]
Be aware of the $78,000 resistance and be prepared to stop losses if the price falls below $76,000.
